mapper.select: select w.id, w.title, m.nickname as artist_name, m.id as artist_id, w.category, case when exists ( select 1 from tbl_auction a where a.work_id = w.id ) then '경매' else '거래' end as sale_type, w.status, to_char(w.created_datetime, 'YY.MM.DD') as created_datetime, w.view_count, w.save_count, wf.file_url as thumbnail_url, vf.file_url as video_url, coalesce(vf.file_type, wf.file_type) as file_type, coalesce(vf.width, wf.width) as file_width, coalesce(vf.height, wf.height) as file_height, coalesce(vf.file_size, wf.file_size) as file_size, a.status as auction_status, a.current_price as current_high_bid, a.bid_count as bid_count, ( select count(*) from tbl_report r where r.target_type = 'WORK' and r.target_id = w.id ) as report_count, ( select to_char(max(r2.created_datetime), 'YY.MM.DD') from tbl_report r2 where r2.target_type = 'WORK' and r2.target_id = w.id ) as last_report_date from tbl_work w join tbl_member m on w.member_id = m.id left join tbl_work_file wf on wf.work_id = w.id and wf.file_type = 'THUMBNAIL' left join tbl_work_file vf on vf.work_id = w.id and vf.file_type = 'VIDEO' left join lateral ( select * from tbl_auction a2 where a2.work_id = w.id order by a2.id desc limit 1 ) a on true where w.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_work set status = #{status}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select count(*) from tbl_work w join tbl_member m on w.member_id = m.id
w.deleted_datetime is null
and ( w.title ilike '%' || #{keyword} || '%' or m.nickname ilike '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
and w.status = #{status}
